title: Scaling Kid's Fashion Brand to $3M/Yr
description: Implemented a rigid horizontal creative-testing pipeline coupled with GA4 server-side pixel tracking, bringing CPA down by 35% in under 90 days.

title: Unlocking 6.2x ROAS for Premium Women's Wear
description: Surgically targeted high-LTV cohorts and set up dynamic catalog overlays, helping the client expand margins and clear out out-of-season inventory.

title: Dominating Facebook Channels for Men's Essentials
description: Redesigned landing pages specifically for social traffic, resulting in a dramatic conversion rate increase from 1.8% to 4.1%.

title: Omnichannel Scaling Blueprints for a Gadget Brand
description: Constructed a comprehensive marketing and acquisition engine, combining paid search, performance social, and advanced email retention schedules.
